name: Tandoori Lamb Chops
description: Char-grilled lamb chops marinated in smoked spices and yogurt, finished over open flame.

name: Smoked Paneer Tikka
description: Cottage cheese marinated in charcoal-smoked masala, skewered and seared.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Slow-simmered tomato and butter gravy, tandoor-roasted chicken, finished with cream.

name: Lamb Rogan Josh
description: Kashmiri red chili braised lamb shoulder, slow cooked for six hours.

name: Truffle Dal Makhani
description: Black lentils simmered overnight, finished with cream and shaved truffle.

name: Saffron Kulfi
description: Hand-churned saffron and pistachio kulfi, served on warm rabri.

name: Dark Chocolate Gulab Jamun
description: Classic gulab jamun filled with molten dark chocolate, rosewater syrup.

name: Estate Rose Lassi
description: Churned yogurt, estate-grown rose petals, a whisper of cardamom.

name: Smoked Old Fashioned Chai
description: Single-estate Assam tea, smoked over cinnamon bark, served warm.
